summary: Completed testing of PVP connection and synchronization fixes. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed correct photo assignment - creator sees their own photos, joiner sees their own photos (not swapped). Code review verified all key fixes: isPlayer1Ref for stale closure avoidance, confirmedPlayer1Id state, exponential backoff reconnection (1s-10s cap), MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS=5.
critical_code_review_comments: PVPBattleArena.jsx correctly uses isPlayer1Ref to track latest player role for WebSocket handlers, avoiding stale closures
confirmedPlayer1Id state is synced from API responses for reliable player identification
Exponential backoff reconnection implemented with BASE_RECONNECT_INTERVAL=1000, MAX_RECONNECT_INTERVAL=10000, using Math.pow(2, attempt)
MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS increased from 3 to 5 for more robust reconnection
TappingArena.jsx uses playerTapsRef and opponentTapsRef for real-time tap state comparison
Backend /pvp/session/{game_id} endpoint returns player1_id and player2_id correctly
Backend WebSocket handler supports reconnection with reconnect_player method and is_reconnect parameter
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users test@blendlink.com and test@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP sync fixes verified: 1) Photo assignment is correct - creator sees their photos, joiner sees their photos (not swapped), 2) isPlayer1Ref prevents stale closure issues in WebSocket handlers, 3) Exponential backoff reconnection (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 10s cap) with 5 max attempts, 4) Backend returns player1_id in session response. Full end-to-end PVP battle testing with both players simultaneously tapping requires manual testing or more complex automation.
